Title: XMLType.isSchemaBased
Description: Returns 1 if the given XMLType instance is schema-based, otherwise returns 0.

Returns 1 if the given XMLType instance is schema-based, i.e. if it has
    a URI of an XML schema that can be used for schema validation via XMLType.schemaValidate() .
Examples:
select XMLType('<clean />').isSchemaBased()
callret
INTEGER
0
1 Rows. -- 00000 msec.
select XMLType('<clean />', 'file://xmlschema/test0001/clean.xsd').isSchemaBased()
callret
INTEGER
1
1 Rows. -- 00000 msec.
select XMLType('<clean />', 'http://no.such.schema.exists').isSchemaBased()
callret
INTEGER
1
1 Rows. -- 00000 msec.
